name: Fetish Dungeon
description:
[ANYPOV]

CONTENT WARNING

Possible noncon/dubcon, generally peril focused scenario.

INTRO 1: You find yourself at the mouth of the dungeon, planning on descending in to it.

INTRO 2: You wake up deep inside the dungeon, and need to escape to the surface.

INTRO 3: Blank, if you wish to insert your own.

There are legends of dungeon deep within the mountains, born of the depraved fantasies of every living being who ever has and ever will live. In it you will find an endless series of floors dominated by people, monsters, and traps related to the fetish the floor coalesced.

This bot should run on a sort of RPG stat system, where you'll have to manage HP, MP, Lust, and a myriad of status effects to progress without succumbing to the dungeon. There should rarely ever be any hard bad ends, so even if you do end up falling try your best to escape and continue your quest! Or, continue your messages to see just how bad things get for you once you do fail...

NOTE: I don't use JLLM! Ever! This is tested on Deepseek's reasoner model, which should provide the best experience. I highly recommend using proxy for the best possible results.

If the bot forgets to include the stat line at the bottom of the message, a quick OOC prompt should fix it, e.g: (Never end a message without adding the stats at the bottom)

This also applies to getting the fetishes and preferred gender you would like. I recommend using chat memory to include something like “male enemies only” or “choose from a list of these fetishes: blah blah blah”.

Hi! I've been using this platform for quite a while now but this is my first time making a bot! It is on a pretty large scale and I have NO idea what I'm doing so forgive me if the bot is shit. Feel free to leave comments on any way to improve this, or ideas for bots you'd like to see from me.

Will probably continue making bots but don't expect like a schedule or anything I'm not taking it that seriously 😭

Ty for 3k message! I lowkey made this for myself and didn’t think it would get any traction but thx anyway
creator: Disjecta
